Vol. 17 
PRETORIA, 5 OCTOBER 2011 
No. 233 
OKTOBER 

2 
No.233 
PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 5 OCTOBER 2011 
IMPORTANT NOTICE 
The Government Printing Works will not be held responsible for faxed documents not received due 
to errors on the fax machine or faxes received which are unclear or incomplete. Please be advised 
that an "OK" Slip, received from a fax machine, will not be accepted as proof that documents were 
received by the GPW for printing. If documents are faxed to the GPW it will be the sender's respon-
sibility to phone and confirm that the documents were received in good order. 
Furthermore the Government Printing Works will also not be held responsible for cancellations and 
amendments which have not been done on original documents received from clients. 
CONTENTS • INHOUD

GENERAL NOTICE 
2668 Gauteng Removal of Restrictions Act (311996): Removal of conditions: Erf 2036. Three Rivers Extension 2 ............ . 
3 
233 

BU'TENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT. 5 OKTOBER 2011 
GENERAL NOTICE 
NOTICE 2668 OF 2011 
ANNEXURE 3 
NOTICE IN TERMS OF SECTION 5 (5) OF THE GAUTENG REMOVAL OF 
RESTRICTIONS ACT, 1996 
(ACT 3 OF 1996) 
No.233 
3 
I, George Frederick Rautenbach van SChOOf, of the finn GVS & Associates, being the authorised agent of the 
owner, hereby give notice in tenus of Section 5(5) of the Gauteng Removal of Restrictions Act, 1996, that i 
have applied to the Emfuleni Local Municipality for the removal of Condition 4 (c) (iii) contained in the Title 
Deed ofErf2036 in the township of Three Rivers Extension 2, Registration Division I.Q. Gauteng held 
under Title Deed No T542 1 0/89, which property is situated at Poplar Street, Three Rivers Extension 2. The 
effect of the application will be to make the relaxation of the building line possible. 
All relevant docwnents relating to the application will be open for inspection during nonnal office hours at 
the office of the said authorised Local Authority at the office of The Manager: Land Use Management, 
1
51 Floor, BDP Building, C/o President Kruger and Eric Louw Streets, Vanderbijlpark for a period of28 days 
from the 28 SEPTEMBER 201 I until 26 OCTOBER 2011. 
Any person who wishes to object to the application or submit representation in respect thereof must lodge the 
same in writing with the said authorised Local Authority at its address and room number specified above 
OR at: 
The Municipal Manager, Emfuleni Municipality, PO Box 3, VanderbijJpark, 1900 on or before 
26 OCTOBER 2011. 
Name and address of owner: Clo GVS & Associates, PO Box 78246, Sandton, 2146. Tel: (011) 472 2320, 
Fax: (011) 472 2305, Ref: N 1656 
• • 
KENNISGEWING 2668 VAN 2011 
BYLAE3 
KENNISGEWING INGEVOLGE ARTlKEL 5 (5) V AN DIE GAUTENGSE WET OP OPHEFFING V AN 
BEPERKINGS, 1996 (WET VAN 1996) 
Ek, George Frederick Rautenbach van Schoor, van die finna GVS & Associates, synde die gemagdigde 
agent van die eienaar gee hiermee kennis ingevolge Artikel 5 (5) van die Gautengse Wet op Opheffings van 
Beperkings, 1996 (Wet 3 van 1996), dat ek by die Emfuleni Plaaslike Munisipaliteit. aansoek gedoen het vir 
die opheffing van Voorwaarde 4 (e) (iii) in die Titel Akte van Erf2036 in die dorp Three Rivers Uitbreiding 
2, Registrasie Afdeling I.Q. Gauteng gebou onder Titel Akte No T5421 0/89, welke eiendom gelee is te 
Poplar Straat, Three Rivers Uitbreiding 2. Die uitwerking van die aansoek sal wees om die verslapping van 
die boulyn moontlik te maak. 
AUe relevante dokumentasie ten aansien van die aansoek Ie ter insae gedurende gewone kantoorure by die 
kantoor van die Kantoor Bestuurder: Grondgebruik, ISle Vloer, EDP Gebou, H/v President Kruger en Erik 
Louw Strate, Vanderbijlpark vir 'n tydperk van 28 dae vanaf28 SEPTEMBER 201 1 tot 260KTOBER2011. 
Enige person wat begerig is om beswaar te maak of vertoe te rig moet sodanige beswaar of vertoe skriftelik 
by die gemelde gemagtigde Plaaslike Bestuur liaseer by die gemelde gemagtigde Plaaslike Bestuur se adres 
en kantoomommer hierbo gemeld OF tot die Munisipale Bestuurder, Emfuleni Munisipaliteit, Posbus 3, 
Vanderbijlpark, 1900 voor of op 260KTOBER 201l. 
Naam en adres van eienaar: PIa GVS & Associates, Posbus 78246, Sandton, 2146. Tel: (011) 472 2320, 
Faks: (011) 472 2305, Verw: N 1656
